# CenterLinked

> The professional network for addiction-treatment business development reps. Share program updates, levels of care, and insurance networks with verified referral partners.

CenterLinked is a secure, verified-only platform for treatment-center BD professionals to connect with peers, post census and program updates, and find in-network referral partners across the country.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, pricing, and FAQ.
- [Login](/login): Sign in to your verified CenterLinked account.
- [Signup](/signup): Apply for a verified CenterLinked account (work email required).

## Optional

- [Pricing](/#pricing): Plans for individuals and organizations.
- [FAQ](/#faq): Common questions about verification, security, and team access.
